notes: v1.14.101 - ARCHIVE STEP (move roadmap Section C, 1+2): the redesign New UI is now the DEFAULT. The bare URL boots into body.rd (Command/Work/Ref) instead of the legacy 5-tab app. redesign_isOn() flipped: returns true by default; operators opt OUT to legacy with ?legacy=1 (persisted as phantom_legacy - the rip-cord). Back-compat: ?redesign=0 is an alias for ?legacy=1, ?redesign=1 / ?legacy=0 clears the opt-out. restore()'s boot guard now calls redesign_isOn() instead of the retired raw phantom_redesign key. Legacy is NOT removed - it stays a full, reachable fallback (?legacy=1) until clean shifts earn the cut of the old 5-tab nav (roadmap C.3/C.4, later). Reversible: revert this commit or use ?legacy=1. All New-UI surfaces verified reachable through v1.14.100.
